FactionDef.Name: HHTools_Raider
FactionDef.label: wasteland raider gang
FactionDef.description: Ruthless scavengers and murderers who live for the thrill of domination. They often mark their armor with blood and chems, worshiping violence as the only truth.

FactionDef.Name: FalloutTribalClan
FactionDef.label: wasteland tribe
FactionDef.description: Descendants of vault dwellers or surface survivors who abandoned technology generations ago. They worship spirits of the old world and wield makeshift weapons crafted from scrap and bone.
